projectsPage.metaDescription: Portfolio projects and internship work by Sittinon Tongsua.
projectsPage.description: Enterprise internship delivery and personal production projects focused on security, performance, and reusable architecture.

projects.title: High-Value Transaction System
projects.description: Built core User Management and Admin modules with strict RBAC, delivered 20+ reusable pixel-perfect components from Figma, and optimized global state + API flow with Zustand, TanStack Query, and Axios.

projects.title: Tiwgun (ติวกัน)
projects.description: A bilingual educational document-sharing platform with hybrid encryption (RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM), sub-second TTFB via RSC + caching strategies, and real-time capabilities through Supabase.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform & Expense Management System
projects.description: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform in a team of four, including relational database design for users, products, and transactions in an Agile workflow.

projects.title: CuteBooth
projects.description: An online photobooth-style web app built with Next.js for fun creative shoots and quick photo sessions.

certificates.name: Excellent Presentation Award (Oral Presentation) AUCC2025

skillsPage.ctaHeading: Ready to build something scalable together?

points: Built User Management and Admin modules with strict Role-Based Access Control according to SA documentation and team coding standards.
Engineered 20+ reusable, pixel-perfect UI components from Figma with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Managed global state with Zustand and optimized data fetching/caching via TanStack Query + Axios.
Implemented client-side validation with Zod to prevent malformed payloads reaching backend services.
Developed bilingual (EN/TH) educational platform with secure material sharing and discovery.
Implemented hybrid encryption (RSA-OAEP + AES-GCM) using Web Crypto API for enterprise-grade API security.
Achieved sub-second TTFB through React Server Components, granular caching strategies, and TanStack Query.
Developed full-stack e-commerce platform with Angular, Node.js, Express.js, and SQL Server.
Designed relational database schema for users, products, and transactions in Agile delivery cycles.
